## Summary

Describe the feature request briefly.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves or the outcome you want.

## How You Think It Should Work

Describe the flow, behavior, or UI you expect.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative you have already considered.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, or links if relevant.
